positive: A minimal, geometric portrait of a smiling woodland fox peering out from behind lush, stylized forest flora. The fox should be depicted with clean, sharp lines and a distinctive, expressive silhouette. The overall style is modern line art mixed with flat graphic illustration, featuring bold color blocking and a limited, nature-inspired palette (teal, burnt orange, forest green). The composition must be centered and highly readable for print, utilizing negative space effectively. The scene should have a whimsical, cozy, and optimistic mood. Vector art quality, perfect for t-shirt printing, clean edges, deep contrast, high detail, no gradients.
negative: photorealistic, 3d, noisy, blurry, text, watermark, logo, copyright, trademark, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy, low resolution, gradient, noise
